name: Iter19 — Browser back button from review page returns to dashboard correctly
description: After navigating from the dashboard to a review detail page at /review/:id, pressing the browser back button should return the user to /dashboard with the reviews table still visible — not a blank page or broken state.

planSteps.description: Verify the reviews history table is visible with at least one row
Click the share link icon on the first review row to navigate to /review/:id
Verify the URL changes to /review/:id and the full review report is visible
Click the browser back button to go back to the previous page
Verify the URL returns to /dashboard and the reviews history table is visible again with the same rows — not a blank page
